title: Clear validation errors
description: A project owner or AI tool gets structured, readable validation errors that name the offending field and rule, with all failures in one document reported together.
iWant: validation failures reported as clear, structured errors
soThat: I can understand and fix what is wrong without reading the schema

acceptanceCriteria.description: A reported validation failure names the offending field and the rule it broke
acceptanceCriteria.then: the error names the offending field and the rule it broke

acceptanceCriteria.description: Multiple validation failures in one document are returned together, not just the first
acceptanceCriteria.given: multiple validation failures in one document
acceptanceCriteria.then: all of them are returned together, not just the first

acceptanceCriteria.description: Validation errors delivered to an AI tool over MCP are structured objects the tool can act on, not free text
acceptanceCriteria.given: a validation error returned to an AI tool over MCP
acceptanceCriteria.then: it is a structured object the tool can act on, not a free-text string
